title: Implement CommandMatcher interface and all built-in matchers
description: Create internal/packs/matcher.go with CommandMatcher interface and all 10 matchers: NameMatcher, FlagMatcher, ArgMatcher, ArgContentMatcher, RawArgContentMatcher, EnvMatcher, CompositeMatcher (AND/OR), NegativeMatcher, AnyNameMatcher. Builder functions (Name, Flags, Arg, ArgAt, ArgPrefix, ArgContent, ArgContentRegex, RawArgContent, Env, And, Or, Not, AnyName). globMatch function. Table-driven unit tests for all matchers, composition, anti-footgun ArgContent vs ArgContentRegex.
